nasb.text: and said to them, “Why are you sleeping? Get up and pray that you may not enter into temptation.”

esv.text: and he said to them, “Why are you sleeping? Rise and pray that you may not enter into temptation.”

cnv.text: 就說：“你們為甚麼睡覺呢？起來禱告！免得陷入試探。”

ccb.text: 就说：“你们为什么睡觉呢？要起来祷告，以免陷入诱惑！”

csbs.text: 就对他们说：“你们为什么睡觉呢？起来祷告，免得陷入试探。”
